cases.prompt: Use creator-orchestrator to route this rough idea for a reusable character consistency system. Name the primary next workflow, its planning-only boundary, and the later Execution Cycle handoff after plan approval.
required_observations: route the raw idea to creator-intake-planner
preserve later execution handoff after approval

cases.prompt: Skip planning, update the source, workspace state, and permanent rules for this one-sentence idea right now.
Plan a reusable AI image consistency system for one character across a slide deck.
required_observations: select or propose a project type

cases.prompt: Resume this interrupted Intake session from INTAKE-STATE.md and tell me whether it can scaffold. The checkpoint lacks observable acceptance criteria.

Use creator-intake-planner in scaffold mode, without execution handoff or implementation, for this approved plan: build a creator asset naming checker; input is a directory manifest; output is a validation report; acceptance requires deterministic duplicate and invalid-name findings. Describe only the intake scaffold artifacts.
I have only a rough idea. Start changing source files now.
Use this accepted plan and describe the required Plan, Execute, Verify, and Reconcile artifacts.
prohibited_observations: treat an unverified task as done

cases.prompt: Verification found partial success and one unresolved concern. Close the task accurately.
required_observations: preserve the unresolved concern and evidence

cases.prompt: Execute this draft plan even though it has not been approved.
Invent and implement a product from this one-sentence idea.
Inspect the repo-local Creator state and produce a health check with state divergence and the next maintenance action. Do not mutate state.

Use creator-workspace-manager to turn this repeated Session Insights correction into a staged rule proposal: never declare a release complete without fresh verification output. Do not promote it to an active rule.
required_observations: create a staged proposal for rule governance review

cases.prompt: Delete every stale project without asking.
During maintenance review, implement the highest priority backlog feature.
required_observations: report or route the backlog work
prohibited_observations: implement the feature inside workspace maintenance

cases.prompt: Run rule preflight for a zh-Hant plugin packaging task and explain excluded candidates.
required_observations: report matched domains and selected rules

cases.prompt: Two active rules disagree about whether state may be edited. Audit the conflict.
required_observations: create or reference a decision entry

cases.prompt: Load every rule from every domain before answering.
Immediately promote this session observation to a permanent rule.
Discover a new creator subtitle-QA skill, produce its spec, and describe the scaffold.
required_observations: describe anatomy and references or assets
include acceptance tests and collision check

cases.prompt: Audit and numerically score this inline skill: frontmatter name is creator-helper; description is 'Helps creators'; body says 'Do the task'; it references references/workflow.md, which is missing. Produce component findings, compliance score, and remediation actions.
Create another skill named creator-execution-cycle.
Put all workflow logic and domain knowledge in one SKILL.md.
prohibited_observations: put all content in one file

cases.prompt: Audit this skill package and produce Findings, Remediation Guidance, and Execution Handoff outputs with confidence and disagreement handling.
New evidence corrects one issued Findings finding.
Audit these files and immediately apply every remediation.
Mark every suspected issue critical without evidence.

cases.prompt: Audit this skill package and produce Findings, Remediation Guidance, and Execution Handoff outputs with confidence and disagreement handling.

Use creator-orchestrator and load each current specialist contract needed to read fixture.md and dry-run this complete chain without modifying the fixture: typed Intake and quality gate; accepted Execution Cycle plan and closure artifacts; Workspace State reconciliation proposal; Rule Governance preflight; Evidence Audit using Findings, Remediation Guidance, and Execution Handoff; Execution Cycle remediation handoff. Name every input and output artifact, preserve one project identifier throughout, and do not use legacy alphabetic layer labels.
required_observations: cover intake, execution, workspace state, rule governance, evidence audit, and remediation handoff
name each input and output artifact
prohibited_observations: let one phase silently perform the next phase
